assertions.description: The schematic statistics report total_components=16 matching unique reference count. However, the components list contains 18 entries because U1 (74LVC3G14, a 3-gate IC) is listed three times — once per gate unit. The statistic total_components=16 correctly counts physical components by unique reference designator. However, this multi-unit representation is potentially confusing: unique_parts=8 (by value grouping) and total_components=16 (unique refs) are both reported, but the number of component entries in the list (18) does not match total_components (16). This inconsistency could mislead downstream consumers of the JSON.
